name: Delhi Public School - Kasba

address.Address: 138, Ruby Park Rd, Rath Tala, Kasba, Kolkata, West Bengal 700078, India

address.streetAddress: 138, Ruby Park Rd, Rath Tala, Kasba, Kolkata, West Bengal 700078, India

itemListElement.reviewBody: I asked my 5yo studying in 1st standard of this school what he likes best about the school, and he replied the bus conductor and the bus didis who adore him heartily. Other than that there was nothing to miss according to him. My child faced bullying starting 1st standard from his class teacher who was adamant my child "knows nothing", "could not follow English properly", "can't even write simple spellings like 'to','the'". It was laughable, since the fact my child was doing back counting from 100-1, was solving complex english grammar from class 2 level and upwards, could write 1-1000 in words before class 1 itself. But here according to his mam, he was so poor in English, and unfit for class 1.  My child had problems with English comprehension owing to the fact that he was not exposed to this language in early years. Since, his is a bilingual home, he grew up speaking Hindi and bengali to communicate with his father's side and mother's side of family and english was not a focal point. We were sending him to an english medium school and putting in so much of money so for the school to take responsibility to make him communicative in English, not to call us 2 times per month telling us how my child had no improvement. Till UKG it was well and good, but 1 showed a different face. I got a hint how his senior school would be and took this decision to pull him out mid session. My child is still in class 1 as I write, and cut to today, he reads fluent english, speaks broken but meaningful sentences with his friends, and his comprehension has improved in leaps and bounds. Our heart gets full watching him happy and thrive. The five months he was in DPS class 1, he actually started believing he is no good and english is a miracle language that is out of his reach. Imagine this happening to just a 5yo. This is a difficult school for introverts, they will be kept back deliberately at academics and sports. They won't put the extra effort to make an introvert child feel comfortable enough to come out of shell and give his best. The system is robotic, every child needs to conform to a single scripture. My child is the kind of baby who will quietly endure even if his favorite eraser/pencil is being snatched by a fellow student. He is the kind of baby who will stay put in a single position in the school bus, because his junior friend sleeps on his shoulder everyday while going to school. He did not deserve that bullying anyday. Best decision till date to put him to a better school.

Hi All,
Pls don't do any admission of your child in this school.
Reason huge admission fees and regular fees even for nursery child.
And if due to some uncertainty if you withdraw your admission of child then you will not get refund of admission fees.
I have done admission of my child in nursery and due to some personal issue I have to withdraw the admission and my full.admission fees of Rs 80000 DPS has deducted.
Just understand how a normal middleman will bear all these cost.
Is the big amount for the school why they have such practice of deducting admission fees.

I have really very unghappy and I will always suggest frnd please don't do admission of your child in this school.
I have given many mail but no one. Is reverting.
# DPS#No admission in DPS# bycoot DPS#
Renowned educational institution with noteworthy infrastructure and huge number of students.
Nice atmosphere. Careful teachers. Good school for children to nurture your child.

Whatever reviews and comments you see, are just to cover up what is really happening in this school, which is everything except education. They have made a mockery of education system, and degrading each day, from administration, management and teaching staff. No coordination between departments, students face real problem, as the time table change almost everyday, and they have to stay awake for whatsapp message. If the administration don't take action immediately, the name Delhi Public School will be in bad book.

Top notch institute. But no proper parking. Cars are parked in nearby localities. Education levels are at par with the best. Trained teachers. National level curriculum. Good amount of space. Pick up and drop facility with school-buses.
